summary: Expanded Berlin draft with 26 active stations, full Ringbahn representation, twin core routes, Potsdamer Platz, Warschauer Strasse, dual BER access, and both Hermannplatz and Hermannstrasse.
designGoals: Represent Berlin's defining Ringbahn (S41/S42) as a complete playable ring connecting all four Kreuz stations.
Keep the Stadtbahn east-west trunk (Spandau to Ostkreuz) as the central corridor with twin competitive routes in the dense core.
Provide dual airport access to BER through Suedkreuz (primary) and Neukoelln (secondary) to avoid dead-end chokepoints.
Preserve both Hermannplatz (U-Bahn cultural hub) and Hermannstrasse (Ringbahn station) to represent the distinct U-Bahn and S-Bahn layers.
Keep draft one playable using proven Hudson Hustle rules and visual tokens.
changeSummary: Expanded from 16 to 26 active stations by activating 4 previously inactive stations and adding 6 new ones.
Added Potsdamer Platz as a central-south anchor connecting Hauptbahnhof, Brandenburger Tor, and Suedkreuz.
Added Warschauer Strasse to complete the Stadtbahn eastern extension through Friedrichshain.
Added twin routes at Hauptbahnhof-Friedrichstrasse and Friedrichstrasse-Alexanderplatz for core competitive tension.
Added second BER access through Neukoelln (length 4 tunnel) alongside the existing Suedkreuz route.
Removed three redundant direct routes (Westkreuz-Suedkreuz, Brandenburger Tor-Suedkreuz, Alexanderplatz-Ostkreuz) that are now better served by through-station paths.
Expanded ticket deck from 29 to 40 tickets (6 long + 34 regular) covering all new stations.
playtestFocus: Check whether the full Ringbahn creates meaningful ring-vs-trunk routing decisions.
Check whether the twin core routes create competitive claiming tension without making the center too easy to traverse.
Check whether dual BER access (Suedkreuz tunnel + Neukoelln tunnel) provides enough airport ticket options.
Check whether Hermannplatz + Hermannstrasse as adjacent nodes feels meaningful or redundant.
Check whether western spurs (Olympiastadion, Spandau, Jungfernheide) feel distinct from the ring path.
Review overall board density: 26 stations and 42 routes may be too congested for readable SVG rendering.
